productDisplayName: W Women Printed Turquoise Blue Kurta
description: Composition Turqouise blue printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a slit neckline, a short buttoned placket, short sleeves and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Every woman needs a choice of kurtas in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this kurta we see the traditional garment in a new avatar with w's innovative styling. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris. Model statistics The product is a size 8 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
